blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 953 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 41°F.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
